versions.version_description: First of all I made some editions to the text structure to improve the overview. I changed the chord postitions and the chords themselfes.
If anyone wants to improve this submission, I'd be really greatful :) Thank you.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabbed by: Melissa11rocks (Melissa)
Email: oval.melissa@hotmail.com
Tuning: Standerd

Hi everyone,
This is my first tab :) I have seen many other tabs of this song but most of them use 
chords, which somepeople (like me) dislike. So i made an easier version.

[tab]Only play the last three strings. ([ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
Strumming pattern: D,D,U-U,D,U[/tab]
No capo

Chords:
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

Verse:
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Hey, slow it down whataya want from me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        
Whataya want from me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah I'm afraid whataya want from me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Whataya want from me[/tab]

Pre-Chorus:
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
There might have been a time[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
When I would give myself away[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Oooh oncee upon a time I didn't give a damn[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
But now, here we are so whataya want from me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Whataya want from me[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Just don't give up I'm workin it out[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Please don't give in, I wont let you down[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
It messed me up, need a second to breathe[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Just keep coming around[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Hey, whataya want from me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
Whataya want from me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
Whataya want from me[/tab]

verse 2:
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Yeah, it's plain to see[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
that baby you're beautiful[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
And there's nothing wrong with you[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
It's me, I'm a freak (yeah)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch] 
but thanks for lovin' me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Cause you're doing it perfectly[/tab]

Pre-Chorus:
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
There might have been a time[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
When I would let you slip away[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
I wouldn't even try[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
But I think you could save my life[/tab]

Chorus: (x3) Or to shorten it x2
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Just don't give up I'm workin it out[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Please don't give in, I wont let you down[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
It messed me up, need a second to breathe[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Just keep coming around[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Hey, whataya want from me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
Whataya want from me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
Whataya want from me[/tab]

~Melissa 
Youtube.com/melissa11rocks
